name: Greek Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients.
2. Beat egg whites until stiff; set aside.
3. Beat butter and remaining 1/2 cup sugar, egg yolks, lemon peel, and juice until fluffy (10 minutes).
4. Add flour and alternate with yogurt.
5. Fold in beaten egg whites.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes.
8. Cool in pan for 10 minutes, then turn out on a rack.
9. Glaze: Mix cream cheese with remaining confectioners sugar and lemon juice/pulp; pour over cooled cake.
The cake was wonderful - moist and delicious. Enjoy!
